lessons.title: Intro to Git
lessons.description: Understand what Git is, why it exists, and how it helps developers work safely and collaboratively.

lessons.title: Version Control Concepts
lessons.description: Learn what version control is, why it exists, and how it helps you work safely.

lessons.title: Shell Commands Refresher
lessons.description: Learn the essential terminal commands you'll use throughout this Git workshop.

lessons.title: Setting Up Git
lessons.description: Install Git and configure your identity so your work is properly tracked.

lessons.title: Initialize a Git Repository
lessons.description: Create your first Git repository and understand the basic Git workflow.

lessons.title: Basic Git Workflow
lessons.description: Learn the core Git workflow used in everyday development.

lessons.title: Introduction to GitHub
lessons.description: Understand what GitHub is, why developers use it, and how it works with Git.

lessons.title: Pushing a Local Repository to GitHub
lessons.description: Learn how to connect a local Git repository to GitHub and upload your code.

lessons.title: Getting Code from GitHub
lessons.description: Learn how to download a GitHub repository to your computer and keep it up to date.

lessons.title: Using HTTPS vs SSH with GitHub
lessons.description: Learn the difference between HTTPS and SSH, and set up SSH authentication with GitHub.

lessons.title: Building Our First Project with Git
lessons.description: Create a simple guessing game and make your first meaningful project commit.

lessons.title: Saving Your Work With Commits
lessons.description: Learn how projects evolve through small, meaningful commits.

lessons.title: Solo Developer Workflow
lessons.description: Learn the simple workflow that many developers follow every day when working on their own projects.

lessons.title: Homework: Build a CLI Todo App with Git
lessons.description: Practice Git by building a Todo application through a series of meaningful commits.
